step_rationale: Tryptophan metabolite triggers macrophage inflammation in atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Kynurenine, produced by IDO1 in thrombi macrophages, amplifies innate immune activation and vascular inflammation in STEMI pathogenesis.

references.title: Untargeted metabolomics identified kynurenine as a predictive prognostic biomarker in acute myocardial infarction.
